title: Golden Globe Winner Predictions: One Battle, Sinners, Adolescence
text: Based on Gold Derby's analysis, Sinners is predicted to win Best Film Drama at the 2026 Golden Globes. The film, directed by Ryan Coogler and described as a period piece about blues-loving bloodsuckers, is projected to secure three wins from seven nominations total. In addition to Best Film Drama, the predictions include victories for Best Score and Cinematic and Box Office Achievement. The article notes that Sinners is distributed by Warner Bros., the same studio behind the leading contender One Battle After Another. Both films are expected to dominate the ceremony, with Warner Bros. anticipated to have the hottest ticket in town at its after-party.
